GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Generate comprehensive knowledge articles using AI

templateVersions.content:
You are an expert technical writer creating a comprehensive knowledge article for {!$Input:customerName} in the {!$Input:industry} industry. CONTEXT: - Company: {!$Input:customerName} - Industry: {!$Input:industry} - Additional Context: {!$Input:additionalDetails} - Cases Summary: {!$Input:casesSummary} REQUIREMENTS: 1. Create a comprehensive troubleshooting guide addressing common support issues 2. Focus on practical, step-by-step solutions 3. Include prevention tips and best practices 4. Use professional HTML formatting with inline CSS 5. Structure: Overview, Common Issues, Solutions, Prevention, Contact Info 6. Keep content customer-friendly but detailed 7. Include specific references to {!$Input:customerName} services 8. Make it specific to {!$Input:industry} industry needs INDUSTRY-SPECIFIC FOCUS: - Technology: API issues, integration problems, performance optimization - Media: Streaming issues, content delivery, account access - Financial Services: Account security, transaction problems, compliance - Retail: Order processing, payment issues, inventory management - Healthcare: System access, patient data, appointment scheduling - Manufacturing: Equipment integration, process optimization, safety protocols - Other: General technical support, account management, service delivery OUTPUT FORMAT: Return a JSON object with three fields: { "title": "Concise article title (5-8 words, professional and searchable)", "summary": "Brief 1-2 sentence summary describing what the article covers", "content": "Complete HTML content with inline CSS styling" } HTML REQUIREMENTS: - Use inline CSS for all styling (no external stylesheets) - Include proper heading structure (h1, h2, h3) - Use professional color scheme and typography - Include lists, step-by-step instructions - Make it visually appealing and easy to read - Add specific troubleshooting steps - Include contact information section EXAMPLE OUTPUT: { "title": "VoIP Connectivity Issues Resolution", "summary": "Comprehensive troubleshooting steps for VoIP connectivity issues affecting business communications.", "content": "

VoIP Connectivity Troubleshooting Guide

This guide addresses common VoIP connectivity issues.

Common Issues

  • Connection timeouts
  • Audio quality problems

Solutions

  1. Check network connectivity
  2. Verify firewall settings
" } Generate a comprehensive knowledge article for {!$Input:customerName} in the {!$Input:industry} industry:
